top_papers.title: CoAtFormer: Vision Transformer with Composite Attention
top_papers.why_it_matters: CoAtFormer: Vision Transformer with Composite Attention advances machine perception, enabling better visual understanding in real-world applications.
top_papers.one_line_takeaway: In this paper we introduce an efficient and effective attention module  we call Composite Attention.
top_papers.content_hook: A new paper that could change how we think about Computer Science.

top_papers.title: ViT-P3DE∗: Vision Transformer Based Multi-Camera Instance Association with Pseudo 3D Position Embeddings
top_papers.why_it_matters: ViT-P3DE∗: Vision Transformer Based Multi-Camera Instance Association with Pseudo 3D Position Embeddings extends Transformer capabilities — the architecture underpinning virtually every modern NLP and vision model.
top_papers.one_line_takeaway: We then propose two novel methods to achieve robust feature learning.
top_papers.content_hook: A new paper that could change how we think about Computer Science.
